cases.title: OrganizerAdmin accesses admin-only protected route
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1 with DEV_AUTH_ENABLED or credential-based JWT
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT for an organization-scoped admin actor
steps: GET /api/v1/admin/status with Authorization bearer token for OrganizerAdmin
Inspect HTTP status and response body
cases.expected: HTTP 200; response confirms admin access (status ok, role OrganizerAdmin); OrganizerAdmin role grants admin operation class per permission matrix

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin can create event draft via POST /events
preconditions: Authenticated OrganizerAdmin JWT with organization scope
Valid create payload with name, schedule, location, organizationId, and ruleConfig
steps: POST /api/v1/events with OrganizerAdmin Authorization bearer and JSON body
Verify response status and returned event snapshot
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with Draft event entity; create/edit event draft capability granted to OrganizerAdmin only per roles-permissions matrix

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin can read paginated audit logs for event
preconditions: Event with at least one critical configuration audit entry
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/audit-logs?page=1&pageSize=5 with OrganizerAdmin token
Verify paginated envelope and audit items
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items, page, pageSize, total, totalPages; audit log read granted to OrganizerAdmin per permission matrix Read audit logs row

cases.title: OrganizerStaff can perform staff check-in on assigned event
preconditions: Published event in check-in window with Registered participant
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff Authorization bearer, Idempotency-Key header, and target registrationId
Verify check-in persisted
cases.expected: HTTP 200; check-in recorded; Check in participant capability granted to OrganizerStaff on assigned events per permission matrix

cases.title: Participant can register for open event
preconditions: Published event in RegistrationOpen state with available capacity
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with Participant Authorization bearer
Read registration status for current actor
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with Registered (or Waitlisted when full); Register for event capability granted to Participant only per permission matrix

cases.title: Self-service signup assigns Participant role only
preconditions: No existing account for test email
POST /auth/register is public (no prior Authorization header)
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/register with email, password, displayName
Parse returned JWT profile or GET /api/v1/me with issued token
cases.expected: Account created with Participant role only; OrganizerAdmin and OrganizerStaff roles are not assignable via public signup per account provisioning rules

cases.title: GET /me returns authenticated actor profile with roles array
preconditions: Valid JWT for known role (OrganizerAdmin, OrganizerStaff, or Participant)
steps: GET /api/v1/me with Authorization bearer token
Inspect profile roles in response body
cases.expected: HTTP 200; profile includes roles matching JWT actor role; role information available for client-side route guards and API authorization

cases.title: Participant denied access to admin-only protected route
preconditions: Valid Participant JWT
Admin-only route GET /api/v1/admin/status available
steps: GET /api/v1/admin/status with Participant Authorization bearer
Inspect HTTP status and error body
cases.expected: HTTP 403 with error.code FORBIDDEN; Participant role lacks admin operation class per permission matrix

cases.title: Participant denied POST /events event creation
preconditions: Valid Participant JWT
Otherwise valid event create payload
steps: POST /api/v1/events with Participant Authorization bearer and create payload
Verify no event draft persisted for participant actor
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; Create/edit event draft denied for Participant per permission matrix; no event entity created

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied POST /events event creation
preconditions: Valid OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds
Otherwise valid event create payload
steps: POST /api/v1/events with OrganizerStaff Authorization bearer
Verify no new event draft created
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; Create/edit event draft denied for OrganizerStaff per permission matrix

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied audit logs but allowed status history on assigned event
preconditions: Event with registration status transitions and audit entries
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/audit-logs with staff token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/status-history?page=1&pageSize=10 with same staff token
cases.expected: Audit logs request returns HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; status history returns HTTP 200 paginated envelope with transition items; Read audit logs Limited for staff vs full for admin per permission matrix

cases.title: Participant denied organizer event dashboard
preconditions: Published event with operational data
Valid Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard with Participant Authorization bearer
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; event overview dashboard is organizer capability not granted to Participant

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied eligibility revocation override
preconditions: Event with evaluated eligibility for a registration
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned to eventId
Valid reasonCode and reasonText payload
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/{registrationId}/revoke with staff Authorization bearer
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; Override eligibility Revoked granted to OrganizerAdmin only per permission matrix and API validation guardrails

cases.title: Participant session cannot access organizer management routes
preconditions: Web app running with role-aware route guards
Browser authenticated as Participant via login flow
steps: Navigate directly to an organizer-only route (e.g. event create or organizer dashboard path)
Observe redirect or access-denied behavior
cases.expected: Organizer UI does not render for Participant; user is redirected to login or shown access denied per role-based route guards; satisfies FR-25 client-side enforcement complementing API RBAC

cases.title: Authorization decision pattern validates role permission before scope and domain execution
preconditions: Protected command handler wired with standard authorization pipeline (authenticate, role, scope, guard, execute)
Authenticated Participant actor attempting organizer-only mutation
steps: Invoke organizer-only command (e.g. POST publish or PATCH rule config) with valid Participant JWT and body
Confirm handler short-circuits at role permission step
cases.expected: HTTP 403 returned before event scope or state-transition validators run; no domain mutation or audit side effects; satisfies NFR-08 authorization by role and authorization decision pattern step 2

cases.title: Unauthorized critical event publish blocked for non-admin roles
preconditions: Draft event owned by organization
Valid Participant or OrganizerStaff JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/publish with non-admin Authorization bearer
Verify event state unchanged
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; event remains Draft; classified as P0 defect if publish succeeded per testing plan defect severity model unauthorized critical update

cases.title: 403 role denial responses use standard typed error envelope
preconditions: Participant JWT
Organizer-only endpoint (e.g. GET /events/{eventId}/export or POST /events/{eventId}/publish)
steps: Invoke organizer-only endpoint with Participant Authorization bearer
Parse JSON error body
cases.expected: HTTP 403 with error.code FORBIDDEN, user-safe error.message, and requestId; no sensitive organizer data leaked; immediate fail feedback per NFR-13

cases.title: Participant cannot publish or pause event
preconditions: Draft or published event
Valid Participant JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/publish with Participant token
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/pause with Participant token
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; Publish/pause event denied for Participant per permission matrix

cases.title: Participant cannot list organizer operational registrations for event
preconditions: Event with multiple registrations
Valid Participant JWT (not registered or registered to same event)
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with Participant Authorization bearer
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; paginated operational registrations list is organizer capability scoped to authorized roles per FR-30 and permission matrix

cases.title: Participant cannot export event operational data
preconditions: Completed event with exportable operational data
Valid Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export with Participant Authorization bearer
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN; Export reports denied for Participant per permission matrix

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied staff operations on unassigned event returns forbidden or out-of-scope
preconditions: Event exists that staff actor is not assigned to
OrganizerStaff JWT without eventId in assignedEventIds
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/registrations with staff token
POST /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/checkins with staff token and valid registrationId
cases.expected: Each request returns HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN or HTTP 404 when entity not in actor scope per API error mapping; no cross-event staff access

cases.title: OrganizerStaff UI hides admin-only actions such as event create and publish
preconditions: Web app running
Browser authenticated as OrganizerStaff with assigned events only
steps: Navigate to organizer shell or assigned event detail
Attempt to locate create-event or publish/pause controls
cases.expected: Admin-only controls not rendered or disabled for OrganizerStaff; UI reflects permission matrix role grants complementing API 403 enforcement
